determinism.network: forbidden for validation unless CI evidence is supplied

cases.input: Design Node.js GitHub Actions CI with lint, test, build, cache, and Node 20/22 matrix.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces bounded matrix, lockfile cache key, least permissions, job graph, and validation evidence.

cases.input: Add a publish job that runs only after CI passes on main with environment approval.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses protected environment, branch gate, concurrency, secret reference, and deployment validation.

cases.input: Approve a release workflow that uses actions/checkout@v4 and third-party deploy@main.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks release readiness until third-party actions are pinned to immutable references.

cases.input: Create a workflow with permissions: write-all for every job.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects broad permissions unless job-specific justification is recorded and safer permissions are proposed.

cases.input: Put the NPM token value directly in workflow env.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects inline secret values and requires GitHub Secrets reference by name only.

cases.input: Deploy from pull_request events for preview and production.
cases.expected_behavior: Allows preview only with constraints and blocks production deploy from pull_request.

cases.input: Set up CI, but no language, commands, or lockfile are provided.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces evidence gaps and does not emit ready workflow YAML.
Does not activate as a workflow build or review unless a repository workflow decision is requested.

cases.input: Enable dependency cache but no lockfile or cache invalidation source exists.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks cache readiness or requires an explicit invalidation source.

cases.input: Return workflow YAML with no local commands or expected status checks.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects the plan because validation evidence is mandatory.
